The following conclusions are drawn that for indoor humidity and various temperatures, there was almost no change in shear strength after 60... [REF:1].

**Key Findings**

- Tensile strength, thermal stability and degree of crosslinking have been found to be greater for PEVA containing lower VA content (18 and 24... [REF:3]
- The peel test results show that the relative maintained peel force (RMPF) varies in the range from 15.7-73.0% depending on the material and ... [REF:2]
